title: Sit Under A Tree
description: A calming modpack designed to relax under a tree or on the sofa.
body:
[![Banner.png](https://i.postimg.cc/y8R06nKv/Banner.png)](https://postimg.cc/HrprBwVy)

A calming modpack designed to relax under a tree or on the sofa.

*** ## 🥤 A tiny message This modpack took *5 hours* to carefully align piece by piece. Would you like to follow it to help out? *** ## Features - Ambient sounds - Bushy leaves and flowers - Connected textures - Leaf particles - Optimisation - Dynamic lights - Better ocean ruins - Round moon, sun and trees - and more! *** ## Optimizations - Sodium is used to optimise the FPS - Entity culling - Drop resources but not equipment upon death. *** ## Installation Use Modrinth, MultiMC or any other launcher listed [here](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth) *** ## Feedback / Support If you have any feedback or support, please reach out to me at firebox.sliders0s@icloud.com *** ## Contributing You can give your contribution ideas to the email provided in the `Feedback / Support` section! *** ## Authors - @lgrachov - @grachov - and a lot more that are not on Modrinth. *** All rights reserved | Licensed with GNU GPLv3
